MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cynthia Schreurs for Dean Glenesk (Petitioner/Administrator).

Ms. Schreurs stated that there was a typo on her notice of hearing, and that she has statements from the heirs showing that they received the petition, read the petition and that they consent to all of the relief being requested in the petition. The Court informed Ms. Schreurs that it wants a starting balance showing the deductions to see how she got to the distribution amounts and that she needs to file a supplement. The Second Amended Petition for Order Approving Final Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to April 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
